title: Amy's Amethyst
description: More uses for amethyst and a new fox variant, Adds new weapons such as the Amethyst Glaive and Amethyst Scythe along with a standard tools and armour set
body:
# Amy's Amethyst
A mod that adds many more uses for amethyst such as armour, tools, new weapons and a new effect. It is a tier above netherite to encourage more exploration in the end and to spice up PvP.
